title: AXChartLegendCompatible

props.name: getLegendItems
props.description: Returns the data items for the legend

props.name: highlightSegment
props.description: Highlights a specific segment by ID

props.name: toggleSegment
props.description: Toggles visibility of a segment by ID. Returns new visibility state (true = visible, false = hidden)
